messages: Hi, I'd like to get a quote for auto insurance. First time insuring on my own.
I'm 34 years old, full G licence. The car is a 2021 Toyota Camry XSE.
The VIN is 2T1BURHE0JC123456. It's currently parked in Mississauga, L5B 2C5.
No accidents or tickets in the last 6 years. I'd like comprehensive and collision coverage.
Those all sound reasonable. What are my best options from the carriers you work with?
